The '''''Blacktooth''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] owned by [[Faskus Olvidan]]. It was destroyed by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] of the ''[[Boneyard Rendezvous]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
